name: Mention
description: Textarea with @-trigger dropdown for mentioning users.

api.name: Mention
api.description: Textarea with @-trigger dropdown for mentioning users.

records.name: MentionOption
records.signature: MentionOption(string Label, string Value, string? Avatar = null, string? Description = null)

examples.title: Trigger Character
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_mentionTriggerStr">
    <SegmentedItem Value="@">@@</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="#">#</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="/"> /</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>

<Mention @bind-Value="_text"
         Options="@GetOptionsForTrigger(_mentionTriggerStr)"
         Trigger="@(_mentionTriggerStr[0])"
         Placeholder="@($\"Type {_mentionTriggerStr} to trigger suggestions...\")" />

@code {
    private string _mentionTriggerStr = "@";
    private string? _text;
}

mdSummary:
# Mention

Textarea with @-trigger dropdown for mentioning users.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/mention
